title: Squirrel Removal in Freeport, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Freeport, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Freeport homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Freeport home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Freeport and Long Island, protecting your property from damage caused by these persistent pests. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in attics, walls, and crawl spaces.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Freeport's diverse neighborhoods from the Nautical Mile to residential areas near Cow Meadow Park, we understand the unique pest challenges facing Long Island properties. Our team provides fast response times, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results backed by our commitment to customer satisfaction.
localContext: Freeport's proximity to water and mature tree-lined streets creates ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive, making homes near areas like the Freeport Recreation Center and properties along canals particularly vulnerable to attic invasions. The village's mix of historic homes and modern residences requires specialized approaches to squirrel exclusion that preserve architectural integrity while effectively solving pest problems.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Freeport?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Freeport typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and repairs to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Freeport attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises during early morning or evening hours, visible droppings in the attic, chewed wires or insulation, entry holes near rooflines or soffits, and squirrel sightings on your roof. Freeport homes with mature oak trees nearby are especially prone to squirrel activity.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Freeport?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods comply with all New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize humane treatment. We use live trapping when appropriate and follow proper relocation or release protocols as required by law, ensuring ethical handling of all wildlife.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Freeport property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Freeport residents and can typically begin the removal process within 24-48 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, though exclusion and repair work may require additional time to ensure your home is fully protected.
